---
title: "My Document"
bibliography: references.bib
---

#Adding notes using callouts


::: {.callout-note}
This is a callout.
You can use it to draw attention to important information.
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Helpful tip"}
Remember to save your file before you render.
:::


:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=35%}add text here
::: {.column width=%}second columns text

::::

[Visit the University of Exeter website](https://www.exeter.ac.uk){target="_blank"}


Here is some text with a footnote.[^1]

[^1]: This is the content of the footnote.

    You can include additional details by going two line below and tab indent.


@feng_ultrasonic_2006;@starnberger_uni-_2014
